title: RAW Projects - Best Engineering & Manufacturing Company
description: BUSINESS NEWS - R.A.W. Projects is honoured...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - R.A.W. Projects is honoured being named the winner of the Best Engineering & Manufacturing Company category in the Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards 2025, a recognition that reflects years of dedication, innovation, and unwavering commitment to excellence.


> From humble beginnings to becoming a trusted name in the industry, R.A.W. Projects has built its reputation on precision, reliability, and a bold can-do approach.


If there’s steel in it - R.A.W. can manufacture it. Their journey has been shaped by a relentless pursuit of quality and a deep belief in the power of teamwork.

“Our success is rooted in the incredible synergy of our team,” says the company’s Managing Director Alistair Simpson. “Every project is a testament to the skill, passion, and professionalism of our people. We couldn’t have achieved this without them.”

R.A.W. Projects also extends heartfelt thanks to their valued clients, whose trust and continued support have been instrumental in reaching this milestone.

“We’re proud to serve the George community and beyond, and we remain committed to delivering engineering solutions that stand the test of time.”

'Our success is rooted in the incredible synergy of our team.'

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
